title: derris thyrsiflora var. eualata
intro: Derris thyrsiflora var. eualata, also known as the Derris or Tinospora, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, including respiratory and skin conditions. Derris thyrsiflora var. eualata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
